note: Daebak content taxonomy (Q&A Expansion Map). MANUALLY EDITABLE, PERMANENT. Slugs define hub URLs /<category> and /<category>/<cluster>. Python pipeline + Next.js site both read this. Counts are computed live. UI hint fields (icon, blurb, label, heroTitle, heroSubtitle, navTopics, featured) are read by the site only; Python ignores them. navTopics power the Categories mega-menu + home card pills; each item links via resolveTopicHref (clusterSlug if it exists, else q -> /search).
